modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a warm and approachable tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Can't sign out of Windows 10 or 11 computers easily.

full_description_text:  
I was trying to sign out of the computer, but it just wouldn't work. When I clicked on my name, it just showed a spinning circle and then nothing happened. The only way I could sign out was by using CTRL+ALT+DEL or right-clicking the icon, which is kinda annoying.
short_description: Can't sign out of Windows 10 or 11 computers easily.
